name: Canvas LMS
description: Open-source learning management system used by schools and universities worldwide.

name: Moodle

description: Course creation platform that lets entrepreneurs build and sell online courses.

description: All-in-one platform for selling digital products, online courses, and memberships.

name: Podia
description: Platform to sell online courses, downloads, webinars, and community memberships.

name: Codecademy

description: Community-driven platform where developers improve skills by solving coding kata challenges.

description: Global online course marketplace with thousands of video courses on every topic.

description: Online learning platform offering university-level courses, certificates, and degree programs.

name: Pluralsight
description: Technology skills platform with expert-led video courses for developers and IT professionals.

description: Online learning platform with business, technology, and creative skills courses from experts.

name: Skillshare
description: Online learning community with thousands of classes in design, business, and creative skills.

name: Khan Academy
description: Free educational platform offering practice exercises and instructional videos across all subjects.

description: All-in-one workspace for students to organize notes, projects, and study materials.
